articles.title: Stephen Lewis, former politician and lifelong social activist, dies at 88
articles.description: OTTAWA — Human rights. Equality for women. The plight of African families decimated by HIV-AIDS. Stephen Lewis spent a lifetime fighting for causes close to his heart — and his weapons of choice were words. Lewis died on Tuesday at the age of 88, eight years after being diagnosed with stomach cancer
